query_title: Beyond Infinity: Buzz and the Journey to Lightyear

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

recommendations.title: Wedding Association 2: Circumcision
recommendations.overview: Ismail and his old screwball crew land themselves in hot water when his grandson's circumcision evolves into a buzz-making citywide event.

recommendations.title: Apollo 11
recommendations.overview: A look at the Apollo 11 mission to land on the moon led by commander Neil Armstrong and pilot Buzz Aldrin.

recommendations.title: Small Fry
recommendations.overview: A fast food restaurant mini variant of Buzz forcibly switches places with the real Buzz and his friends have to deal with the obnoxious impostor.

recommendations.title: Toy Story

recommendations.title: Lightyear
recommendations.overview: Legendary Space Ranger Buzz Lightyear embarks on an intergalactic adventure alongside a group of ambitious recruits and his robot companion Sox.

recommendations.title: Buy Now! The Shopping Conspiracy
recommendations.overview: This subversive documentary unpacks the tricks brands use to keep their customers consuming — and the real impact they have on our lives and the world.

recommendations.title: The Curious Birth of Benjamin Button

recommendations.title: Rebel Without a Cause

recommendations.title: No Half Measures: Creating the Final Season of Breaking Bad
recommendations.overview: A documentary about the making of season five of the acclaimed AMC series Breaking Bad.
